items.title: Bill Ackman Questions Credit Card Rewards Structure, Says Low-Income Consumers Subsidize Premium Cardholders Amid Trump Rate Cap Debate
items.description: Bill Ackman criticized credit card rewards programs, saying low-income consumers end up subsidizing benefits for wealthy cardholders.

items.title: Does Trump’s 10% Credit Card Rate Cap Make Visa and Mastercard a Buy?
items.description: President Donald Trump announced on his social media platform Truth Social that he will impose a one-year cap on credit card interest rates at 10%, effective Jan. 20, the one-year anniversary of his second inauguration. He cited affordability concerns and criticized rates of 20% to 30% under the prior administration. This move represents yet another ... Does Trump’s 10% Credit Card Rate Cap Make Visa and Mastercard a Buy?

items.title: This Fund Dumped a $16 Million Waystar Stake as Shares Lagged the Market by Nearly 30 Points
items.description: Waystar specializes in cloud-based payment solutions for the healthcare industry, serving providers with financial and analytics tools.

items.title: Stablecoin firm Rain boosts valuation to $1.95b in latest fundraise
items.description: Stablecoin firm Rain has just raised another $250 million. The firm now has a $1.95 billion valuation. Fintech companies focusing on stablecoins are having more success.

items.title: 5 Things That Won't Happen In 2026 (The Alpha Of Inertia)
items.description: This article lays out five slow-moving certainties for 2026 that investors can lean on. Click here to read more.
